key_indicators: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq drop as Hormuz tensions increase - Yahoo Finance — Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq drop as Hormuz tensions increase  Yahoo Finance

Today on the U.S. stock market, the Dow fell more than 550 points, S&P 500 declined, Nasdaq saw three-day winning streak snapped as Iran tensions lifted oil. Story stocks included GameStop, eBay, Berkshire Hathaway, Micron and Palantir. - MarketWatch — Today on the U.S. stock market, the Dow fell more than 550 points, S&P 500 declined, Nasdaq saw three-day winning streak
